phase2_outcome.validity_probe_note: With high-turnover strategy, validity passes but collapse ratio fails

cost_mode.observation: Performance degrades as bps costs rise (5->10->20 bps).

asymmetry.observation: Entry/exit asymmetry case underperforms symmetric 10 bps case.

regime.observation: Stress regime Sharpe is materially weaker than calm regime.

turnover.observation: Low-turnover baseline fails validity evidence thresholds; high-turnover probe passes validity but fails collapse gate.

hypotheses.title: Signal quality insufficient in stress regimes
hypotheses.expected_impact: Reduce collapse windows and improve stress Sharpe
hypotheses.test_design: Add regime-conditioned features and compare stress-only walkforward metrics
hypotheses.success_criterion: stress_sharpe >= 1.0 and stress collapse ratio decreases

hypotheses.title: Cost drag too high for current entry threshold
hypotheses.test_design: Add EV hurdle = expected edge - estimated cost > 0 before entry
hypotheses.success_criterion: 10/20 bps robustness retains non-negative OOS total return

hypotheses.title: Turnover-control imbalance
hypotheses.expected_impact: Find turnover band that satisfies validity and preserves stability
hypotheses.test_design: Constrain trades with cooldown/min-signal-strength and rerun walkforward
